violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the (dairy cooler shelves ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2025

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment, litter, trash, and/or other debris were observed in the (outside refuse ) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2025
Area on side of building was observed with an accumulation of twigs and leaf litter. Area to be cleaned to prevent harborage conditions for pests. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2024
The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. New Violation. Correct By: 03/21/2024

Packages of chips were observed in direct contact with rodent droppings and gnawed materials, packages of noodles were observed gnawed. PIC to provide list of adulterated foods to inspector. New Violation. Correct By: 03/21/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by strong urine odor throughout the facility, rodent droppings throughout the facility, gnawed product, and live rodent observed during inspection. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 03/21/2024

Dead rodent observed on glue board. Dead or trapped birds, insects, rodents, and other pests shall be removed from control devices and the PREMISES at a frequency that prevents their accumulation, decomposition, or the attraction of pests PIC informed to remove. New Violation. Correct By: 03/21/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving throughout the building have an accumulation of rodent droppings. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/21/2024

Refuse area was observed with an accumulation of trash, litter, leaf litter. Refuse area must be maintained clean and free of litter to prevent harborage for pests. Dumpster was also observed overflowing. New Violation. Correct By: 03/21/2024

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of rodent droppings and debris. Physical facilities must be cleaned as frequently as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/21/2024
Various food products were observed stored on the floor in the retail area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 06/21/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the retail shelves: 1.pet food shelves 2.condiment/baking goods shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, droppings and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/21/2023
Refrigerator shelves have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/21/2023
